data.title: Target Circle Deal Days to run same time frame as Prime Day
data.description: The retailer has opted to compete directly with Amazon, running its sales event on the same four days as the summer Prime Day 2026 period. Last year, each of the three retailers held their events in July.

data.title: Walmart Deals returns for a week, timing with Amazon Prime Day
data.description: This year's Walmart Deals promotional period comes earlier than last year, when it ran from July 8 to July 13.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How do retailers improve conversion with omnichannel options?
data.description: Retail Chains with omnichannel services continue to see higher conversion rates than those that do not, especially when it comes to one specific fulfillment option.

data.title: Adidas offers ecommerce-as-a-service (EAAS) featuring AI agents
data.description: The retailer launched the Audi F1 website in eight weeks, according to Adidas senior project manager Dominik Seeberger. It demonstrates how Adidas is using Salesforce and its agentic AI to launch a new business model for the retailer.

data.title: GrubMarket adds AI agent with goal to assist sales teams
data.description: The agent is designed to streamline the sales process, from identifying prospects to delivering customized proposals, GrubMarket said.
